nodes.name: Daily 10AM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: 10:00 AM ET daily. 10 AM EDT = 14:00 UTC (summer), 10 AM EST = 15:00 UTC (winter). Both within cadence.md peak window 14:00-16:00 UTC.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Taostats Subnet 106
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 subnet data (emissions, registration cost, tempo)

nodes.name: Taostats Pool
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 dTAO pool data (alpha price, TAO reserve, alpha reserve)

nodes.name: CoinGecko TAO
nodes.notes: Fetch TAO price, 24h change, market cap, volume from CoinGecko

nodes.name: CoinGecko SN106
nodes.notes: Fetch SN106 alpha token price and 24h change from CoinGecko (coin ID: liquidity-provisioning)

nodes.name: Wait For All APIs
nodes.notes: Wait for all 4 parallel HTTP requests to complete before proceeding. Uses append mode with 4 inputs so the node waits for data on every branch.

nodes.name: Merge Data
nodes.notes: Merge all API responses. Track which APIs failed.

nodes.name: Too Many API Failures?
nodes.notes: If more than 2 APIs failed, skip posting and notify.

parameters.name: content

nodes.name: Error: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify Vew via Discord that too many APIs are down.

nodes.name: Format Tweet
nodes.notes: Format metrics into tweet. Auto-truncate if over 280 chars. Numbers formatted for readability (hint: use Space Grotesk for manual image creation).

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: Safe default: DRY_RUN must be strictly 'false' to publish. Any other value (true, undefined, empty) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Prepare dry-run data for Discord notification. No filesystem writes for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN: Discord Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run output to Discord for review instead of writing to filesystem.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before external posting APIs. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: Which Posting API?
nodes.notes: Route to the configured posting API. Each output has a named condition. Fallback goes to failure notification if POSTING_API is not recognized.

nodes.name: Post via OpenTweet
nodes.notes: Post tweet via OpenTweet API (7-day trial, then $6/mo).

nodes.name: Post via X API
nodes.notes: Post tweet via X API v2. Requires OAuth 1.0a credentials. X API Basic $200/mo.

nodes.name: Post via Outstand
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER: Outstand API not yet available. Update when API docs published.

nodes.name: Check Post Result
nodes.notes: Verify the posting API returned a successful response before sending success notification.

nodes.name: Post Succeeded?
nodes.notes: Route to success or failure notification based on API response.

nodes.name: Success: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Notify Vew of successful post.

nodes.name: Failure: Discord Notify
nodes.notes: Alert Vew that posting failed. Includes draft tweet for manual posting.
